former_council_members.name: Tom Butt
former_council_members.notes: Longest-serving council member, mayor 2015-2022 (re-elected 2018), on council 1995-2014. E-Forum blog. Legal name 'Thomas K. Butt' in official filings.

former_council_members.name: Nat Bates
former_council_members.notes: First elected 1967, ~32 years total service. Mayor 1971-72, 1976-77. Re-elected 2018, final term ended Jan 2023.

former_council_members.name: Gayle McLaughlin
former_council_members.notes: Mayor 2007-2014 (two terms). On council 2005-2006, 2015-2017 (resigned), 2021-2022. Green Party, progressive coalition.

former_council_members.name: Irma Anderson
former_council_members.notes: Mayor 2001-2006. First Black woman mayor of Richmond. Died January 2024 at age 93.

former_council_members.name: Jovanka Beckles
former_council_members.notes: Council 2011-2018. Progressive coalition. Left to run for state office (AD-15).

former_council_members.name: Jael Myrick
former_council_members.notes: Council 2013-2020. Appointed Feb 2013, elected 2014, re-elected 2016.

former_council_members.name: Melvin Willis
former_council_members.notes: Council 2017-2024. RPA wave 2016. Lost 2024 re-election to Jamelia Brown.

former_council_members.name: Ben Choi
former_council_members.notes: Council 2017-2020. RPA wave 2016. Previously on Planning Commission (2010).

former_council_members.name: Demnlus Johnson III
former_council_members.notes: Council 2019-2022. Youngest ever elected to Richmond council (age 25). Ada Recinos was youngest appointed (26 in 2017) before Johnson was elected.

former_council_members.name: Vinay Pimple
former_council_members.notes: Council 2015-2016 (appointed), 2019-2020 (elected 2018). Lost District 6 in 2020.

former_council_members.name: Corky Booze
former_council_members.notes: Council 2011-2014. Vice mayor 2013. Legal name 'Courtland'.

former_council_members.name: Jeff Ritterman
former_council_members.notes: Council 2009-2012. RPA-backed cardiologist at Kaiser.

former_council_members.name: Harpreet Sandhu
former_council_members.notes: Council ~2007-2008. Appointed to fill McLaughlin vacancy. First Sikh councilman in Richmond.

former_council_members.name: Ludmyrna Lopez
former_council_members.notes: Council 2007-2010. One term.

former_council_members.name: Richard Griffin
former_council_members.notes: ~25 years on council through ~2008. Vice Mayor at various points.

former_council_members.name: John Marquez
former_council_members.notes: First Latino councilman. Appointed 1985, ~18 years. Lost 2008 re-election.

former_council_members.name: Gary Bell
former_council_members.notes: Council ~2000-2005. Won 2012 re-election but died before taking office (age 54, 2013).

former_council_members.name: Tony Thurmond
former_council_members.notes: Council 2005-2008 (appointed July 2005 to fill vacancy, elected 2006). Later WCCUSD school board (2008-2012), State Assembly AD-15 (2014-2018), CA Superintendent of Public Instruction (2019-present).

former_council_members.name: Ada Recinos
former_council_members.notes: Council 2017-2018. Appointed Sept 2017 to replace Gayle McLaughlin (who resigned for Lt. Gov. race). Youngest councilmember in Richmond history at 26. RPA-affiliated. Lost 2018 election.

notable_non_members.name: Ahmad Anderson
notable_non_members.notes: NEVER served on council. Ran 2020 (Dist 5, lost), 2024 (Dist 5, lost). Running for Mayor 2026 (FPPC #1481105). Paper filer — files with City Clerk, not NetFile e-filing. Son of former mayors Booker T. Anderson and Irma Anderson.

notable_non_members.name: Oscar Garcia
notable_non_members.notes: NEVER served on council. Ran for Dist 3 in 2022, lost. Was on Community Police Review Commission.

notable_non_members.name: Shawn Dunning
notable_non_members.notes: NEVER served on council. Ran for mayor 2022 (lost) and Dist 6 in 2024 (lost).

city_leadership.name: Shasa Curl
city_leadership.title: City Manager
city_leadership.notes: Legal name 'Kinshasa Curl' appears in CAL-ACCESS/NetFile filings; goes by 'Shasa' publicly

city_leadership.name: Robert Armijo
city_leadership.title: City Engineer
city_leadership.notes: DEP DIR PW - CITY ENGINEER; classified level 2 due to City Engineer role

commissions.name: Richmond Housing Authority
commissions.notes: Joint powers authority. City Council sits as the Board of Commissioners. eSCRIBE lists as 'Housing Authority Board of Commissioners'.
